name: provenance manifest generation-time consumption block carries pr_corpus_state per the schema
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/provenance && printf '{"commit":"abc","pr_corpus_state":{"cfpb":{"patterns_consulted":["p1"],"last_fetch":"t","freshness_at_generation":"fresh-within-fetch-frequency","evidence_count_used":3}}}\n' > .claude-tdd-pro/provenance/abc.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/validate-consumption-schema.sh" --manifest .claude-tdd-pro/provenance/abc.json --check pr-corpus-state 2>out.txt && grep -q 'pr_corpus_state_present=true' out.txt && grep -q 'sources_count=1' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
